info.title: CodeBridge.Cli
info.description: CodeBridge CLI tool - Generate TypeScript SDKs from .NET APIs

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
CodeBridge automatically generates TypeScript/JavaScript SDKs from your .NET APIs.

Simply add [GenerateSdk] attributes to your endpoints and run 'codebridge generate'.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new CodeBridge configuration file
